MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-09-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-14-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
#5 BENSON/BAUER: C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY. ALL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, RICHARD CUNNINGHAM, BRENDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL ST #607 $1,130.15 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,210.15, STAYED UNTIL JUL-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM - IF VACATE BEFORE THEN, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. ANY PROPERTY LEFT AFTER THEN IS DEEMED ABANDONED. DEFT MARTIN WITHDRAWS HIS RENT CONTROL BOARD ACTION #0006-80T.
